Headline: No Trains Between Division and Jackson
ShortDescription: Blue Line service has been temporarily suspended between Division and Jackson due to track conditions.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Blue Line service has been temporarily suspended between Division and Jackson due to track conditions.

As a result, trains are operating in two sections:

between O'Hare and Damen/Milwaukee, and,
between LaSalle and Forest Park, only.

Bus shuttles have been requested from Damen/Milwaukee to LaSalle to provide connecting service through the affected area.

Consider other service alternatives that may serve your trip, such as nearby bus routes or using buses to other rail lines.

These may include:
#66 Chicago
#8 Halsted
#56 Milwaukee
#70 Division

See station personnel for further assistance, and pay attention to announcements on trains and at stations for service information.

We are working to restore service as quickly as possible. Allow extra travel time
